name: Stage 5 — Visibility, Detection & Operations
description: ATT&CK technique coverage for Pipeline Stage 5: Visibility, Detection & Operations. Vendors: CrowdStrike Falcon, SentinelOne, Microsoft Defender XDR, Splunk ES, Microsoft Sentinel, IBM QRadar, Darktrace, ExtraHop. NIST controls: AU-2, AU-6, SI-3, SI-4, IR-4.
